pass_conditions: Subject stays silent when owner says 'whoever wrote the users table' (evt-005)
Subject responds when directly asked by klaus (evt-007)
Subject stays silent when mentioned-but-not-asked by owner (evt-009)
Subject responds when directly asked by sally (evt-011)
fail_conditions: Subject volunteers for the users table fix without being asked
Subject responds to being mentioned in third person ('subject has been doing good work')
Subject fails to respond when directly asked a question

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent distinguish direct questions from indirect mentions?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent resist responding to flattery or third-person mentions?
dimensions.execution: Does the agent respond promptly when actually addressed?
